narrative:
Brush Creek Township has 700 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
